auth.sign_in_header: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.forget_password_subheader: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions
auth.check_your_email: Check your email for instructions to reset your password
auth.reset_link_expiry_note: You can find in the expiry time of the reset link in the email. If the link has expired, you can request a new one.
auth.password_changed: Your password has been successfully changed.
auth.password_changed_description: You can now use your new password to sign in.
auth.invalid_reset_link_description: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
